Text.Page: Here are the materials you'll need to make officer's hauberks. Elves are not prone to excessive oversight, but seeing your fine work would be most appreciated.
The work is good. Acarum has need for such fine work.
The design and kits have been provided. If a crafter has need of additional materials, the crafter should seek the crafting vendors.
Your efforts will help us win this war, <PCNAME>. The federation thanks you!
